rot_pulse.name: Rot Pulse
rot_pulse.description: Emit a decaying pulse that erodes the target’s structure and applies minor corruption.

glitch_lash.name: Glitch Lash
glitch_lash.description: Strike with a chaotic glitch lash that fluctuates wildly in power.

viral_thread.name: Viral Thread
viral_thread.description: Weave a viral thread into the target’s data, increasing their corruption level.

mutation_spike.name: Mutation Spike
mutation_spike.description: Trigger an unstable mutation that boosts one stat while weakening another.

decay_bloom.name: Decay Bloom
decay_bloom.description: Unleash a spreading bloom of decay that inflicts damage over time.

corrupt_surge.name: Corrupt Surge
corrupt_surge.description: Channel a surge of corrupted energy that grows stronger with the target’s corruption level.

instability_break.name: Instability Break
instability_break.description: Release a glitch-phase burst that destabilizes the target’s next move.

overrun_wave.name: Overrun Wave
overrun_wave.description: Send out a viral wave that spreads corruption across all enemies.

data_rot.name: Data Rot
data_rot.description: Inflict deep data rot that weakens the target’s defenses and causes sustained erosion damage.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Corrupt technique reserved for future awakening.
